title: doppler: zeroization gap not in module-level docs, only in inline comment
description: Trigger: user reads crate docs at docs.rs. The ZEROIZATION GAP comment exists inline (lib.rs:138-146) but there is no module-level # Zeroization section, unlike vault and gcp-sm which both have one. Users reading only the module doc don't know the secret value passes through serde_json non-Zeroizing allocations. Fix: add a # Zeroization section mirroring the vault pattern.
